description: Call GET /api/douyin/search-video/v4 for Douyin (TikTok China) Video Search through JustOneAPI with keyword.

operations.description: Get Douyin (TikTok China) video Search data, including metadata and engagement signals, for content discovery, trend research, and competitive monitoring.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description:
Sorting criteria for search results.

Available Values:
- `_0`: General
- `_1`: More likes
- `_2`: Newest
parameters.name: sortType

parameters.description:
Filter by video publish time range.

Available Values:
- `_0`: No Limit
- `_1`: Last 24 Hours
- `_7`: Last 7 Days
- `_180`: Last 6 Months
parameters.name: publishTime

parameters.description:
Filter by video duration.

Available Values:
- `_0`: No Limit
- `_1`: Under 1 Minute
- `_2`: 1-5 Minutes
- `_3`: Over 5 Minutes
parameters.name: duration

parameters.description: Search ID; required for pages > 1 (use the search_id value returned by the last response).
parameters.name: searchId
